caption: The video appears to be a presentation slide focusing on different methods, likely within a professional or academic context. The slide is titled "METHODS" and lists four key approaches: Contract, Inquiry, Attunement, and Involvement. Each method is bullet-pointed with a yellow dot for emphasis. The background of the slide is a textured orange color, giving it a slightly informal yet visually engaging appearance. There is no visible change between the two frames provided, suggesting that this particular segment of the video might be a static display of information, possibly accompanied by a voiceover or additional text that explains each method in detail. The simplicity of the design suggests a focus on clarity and direct communication of the content.
